title: MikroTik L23UGSR-5HaxD2HaxD-NM, NetMetal ax
description: Our toughest long-range outdoor access point â now with WiFi6 ! The NetMetal ax is equipped with dual-band WiFi6 , 1G ETH port and 2.5G SFP port. It features a USB port and a free miniPCIe slot with a SIM slot for installing an LTE modem or LoRA card, allowing you to create backup mobile connectivity or an IoT gateway.
